title: HighBridge Audio
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
[[File:HighBridge_Audio.jpg|thumb|right|150px|HighBridge Audio logo]]
'''HighBridge Audio''' is the publisher of the original [[Star Wars radio dramas|''Star Wars'' audio dramas]], as well as several additional audio dramatizations. For ''[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|Return of the Jedi]],'' HighBridge undertook the drama's production, in addition to publishing the recording.

HighBridge publishes audiobooks, audio/radio dramatizations, and spoken word audio on CD and digital downloadable files. It was founded by [[Wikipedia:Minnesota Public Radio|Minnesota Public Radio]] and incorporated in [[1989]]. From [[1991]] to 2007, the [[Wikipedia:Penguin Group|Penguin Group USA Inc]] distributed HighBridge's products. From 2007 to 2014, HighBridge products were distributed by Workman Publishing. In May of 2014, HighBridge was acquired by Recorded Books.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.publishersweekly.com/pw/by-topic/industry-news/industry-deals/article/62155-recorded-books-buys-highbridge-audio.html|text=Recorded Books Buys HighBridge Audio|work=''Publishers Weekly''|date=2014-05-05|archivedate=20221208101734}}</ref>
